rows.label: tev036801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev036801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Heradot about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev036801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev036801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Heradot about recent developments.

rows.label: tev036801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Heradot about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev036801_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Heradot about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev036801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Heradot about recent developments.

rows.label: tev036801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Heradot about recent developments.

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0001
rows.name:
The outside of our ship's hull uses
cutting-edge laser coating, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0002
rows.name:
It can repel heavy fire from even the
nastiest Growth energy weapon, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, the engineers didn't account for for
more basic weaponry like missiles. Because
no one fights with missiles in space, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Once the Growth found out and set up artillery,
we were in in some pretty hot water, weren't we?
It's a good thing you you you bailed us out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm working on upgrading the
ship's armor, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0010
rows.name:
...What's that? It's not
safe out here? Nonsense![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'll have you know that I'm the
most limber, athletic Ma-non you'll
ever meet! ...Er, probably?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Regardless, I can handle a few repairs 300
meters off the ground without a safety net,
so that has to count for something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0017
rows.name:
The outside of our ship's hull
already had a special laser
coating technology, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0018
rows.name:
But I spoke with Engine Chief Biiponne, and we decided
we needed to add armor that could handle Growth missiles
and the like. A superbarrier, if you follow?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Thanks to that, we were able to
shrug off all of their efforts
during the attack on on the city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG0020
rows.name:
There will be no more repeats of Valley of Oblivion,
okay? We'll never be caught with our pants down again,
as you humans say! ...Er, you DO say that, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1001
rows.name:
Biiponne suggested we whip up some
armor to protect the engine...or
the ship's power source, I guess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1002
rows.name:
Now the ship can can handle anything:
lasers, missiles, sonic weapons, dark
weapons... You name it, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1003
rows.name:
I almost WANT to see the Growth try to
destroy it! ...Er, but not really?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1004
rows.name:
Me and the other technicians couldn't have built it
without Biiponne, though. No one else knows our ship's
power source inside and out like that, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1005
rows.name:
So even if more Growth forces are
still out there, we'll probably
never need to be scared again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1010
rows.name:
You gave those enemies that
shot me a proper thrashing,
right? Thanks for for for that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1011
rows.name:
I'm glad Bihabba had the
presence of mind to tell you
I was in trouble, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1012
rows.name:
I made sure it's a known secret on
the ship that you're the human to
count on, if that's all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG1013
rows.name:
Anyway, don't be surprised if
your popularity goes way way up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG2001
rows.name:
Pizza for breakfast. Pizza for lunch. Pizza
for second lunch. I've been spending myself
right into pizza heaven, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG2002
rows.name:
But I think I may have eaten too
much, maybe? I don't feel quite
as limber as I usually am...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036801_MSG2003
rows.name:
But no one's going to shoot at
me anymore, right? So so less
worrying, more pizza scarfing![ST:wait ]
